title: Stock Market Buzz: Digital Realty's Robust Data Center Demand
description: Investors in Singapore are buzzing about Digital Realty's stock as the company raises its annual forecast on strong data center demand.

sources.title: Digital Realty raises annual FFO forecast on robust data center demand
Digital Realty Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
Ascenty: "particularly strong contributions" for Digital Realty's Americas

sections.heading: Digital Realty's Financial Performance
paragraphs: Digital Realty has raised its annual forecast for funds from operations (FFO) due to robust demand for data centers, according to CNA.

sections.heading: Second Quarter Results
paragraphs: Yahoo Finance Singapore reports that Digital Realty has released its second quarter 2026 results.

sections.heading: Ascenty's Contribution
paragraphs: BNamericas highlights that Ascenty has made particularly strong contributions to Digital Realty's Americas division.

faq.q: Why has Digital Realty raised its annual FFO forecast?
faq.a: According to CNA, Digital Realty has raised its annual forecast for funds from operations (FFO) due to robust demand for data centers.

faq.q: What was the source of Digital Realty's strong performance in the Americas?
faq.a: BNamericas reports that Ascenty has made particularly strong contributions to Digital Realty's Americas division.
